meaning: n.(美国纽约市)曼哈顿区人
examples: Uma Thurman’s stressed Manhattanite has a Van der Graaf hair day, ignores her children and taps out a blog.
Uma Thurman's stressed Manhattanite has a Van der Graaf hair day, ignores her children and taps out a blog.
As a 42 year old male Manhattanite who's been with the same woman for 17 years, married 12 and had a child for 5 I think I have a few tricks to keep your mate happy.
And I especially loved the claw-foot tub -- a real treat for a Manhattanite.
But that sure ain't Gretta Lee, an ebullient Manhattanite and school admissions officer who combed the New York sky recently, a barrette keeping her dreadlocks out of her face.
